mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_activity ORDER BY activity_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_activity WHERE club_id = #{clubId} ORDER BY activity_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_activity(club_id, title, content, activity_time, duration, location, create_time) VALUES(#{clubId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{activityTime}, #{duration}, #{location}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE t_activity SET club_id = #{clubId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, activity_time = #{activityTime}, duration = #{duration}, location = #{location} WHERE id = #{id}
